title: 5 Technology Stocks That Hiked Dividends to Watch in 2024
text: Motorola (MSI), Qualcomm (QCOM), Universal Display (OLED), Broadcom (AVGO) and ATN International (ATNI) are some technology stocks to watch for healthy dividend hike in 2024.

title: Motorola (MSI) Boosts Security Portfolio With IPVideo Buyout
text: The buyout extends Motorola's (MSI) end-to-end physical security offering by integrating a non-video threat detection product into its safety and security ecosystem.

title: Motorola Solutions Acquires IPVideo, Creator of the HALO Smart Sensor
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) has acquired IPVideo, the creator of the HALO Smart Sensor, an all-in-one intelligent sensor that detects real-time health and safety threats. The company is based in Bay Shore, New York. The HALO Smart Sensor is a multifunctional safety and security device with built-in vape detection and air quality monitoring, gunshot detection, abnormal noise and motion detection and emergency keyword detection. title: Motorola (MSI) Boosts Emergency Services' Communication System
text: New South Wales State Emergency Services selects Motorola (MSI) SmartConnect to support emergency responders with a robust communication system.

title: CMTL or MSI: Which Is the Better Value Stock Right Now?
text: Investors interested in Wireless Equipment stocks are likely familiar with Comtech Telecommunications (CMTL) and Motorola (MSI). But which of these two stocks presents investors with the better value opportunity right now?

title: Nearly Two-Thirds of Retail Workers Are Worried About Personal Safety this Holiday Season
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--As the year's peak shopping season hits its stride, an inaugural Retail Worker Safety Report from Motorola Solutions (NYSE: MSI) found that many retail workers and managers perceive safety incidents at their stores are on the rise. The survey's U.S. respondents reported that petty theft (54%), grab-and-run incidents (35%) and hostile customer interactions (31%) have increased in their stores over the past year, and as a result, nearly two out of three are at least some.

title: 15 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: December is the last opportunity for companies to announce yearly dividend increases. 15 companies expected to raise their dividends in the upcoming week, with a focus on up-and-comers in the dividend growth space. The companies feature an average increase of 8.6% and a median increase of 4.9%.

title: Motorola Solutions: Rising Crime Rates Boost Public Security And Surveillance Markets
text: Motorola Solutions has exited the handset market and focused exclusively on public safety and enterprise security. The company's APX NEXT two-way radio system has contributed to significant growth in revenue and profitability. The surge in crime rates is driving demand in the public security and surveillance markets, benefiting Motorola's business.

title: Motorola (MSI) to Boost Airport Communication in Germany
text: Motorola (MSI) will deploy the DIMETRA X Core system to boost TETRA radio communication infrastructure in Cologne Bonn Airport.
